ModuleName: Hash Algorithms and Applications: Password Hashing and Beyond

Artifacts.Name: Module Topics
Artifacts.Description: Outlines the module's learning topics—from basic hash function concepts and cryptographic properties (preimage and collision resistance) through password hashing fundamentals and beyond—serving as a navigational overview for learners and instructors to understand the scope and sequence of the module.

Artifacts.Name: Module Topics (HTML)
Artifacts.Description: This HTML page outlines the topics covered in the module on hash algorithms and applications, including introductory hashing concepts, password hashing, and related use cases, giving learners and instructors a structured overview of what will be explored throughout the module.
